title: So I heard a lot of folks didnt like Mari
display_title: So I heard a lot of folks didnt like Mari
wikitext:
[]: So I heard a lot of folks didn't like Mari [SPOILERS] Post by IllustriousMilkshake » Sat Apr 10, 2010 7:34 am well what do you bros think?

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:00 am I'll let you know when Anno sees fit to tell us anything about her.

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:39 am She's alright... SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:44 am NemZ wrote: I'll let you know when Anno sees fit to tell us anything about her.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:47 am I like her. I'm looking forward to her scenes in the next installments.

[]: Post by KaaVI » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:52 am its because of her that my new fave evangelion unit is 02

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Apr 10, 2010 11:10 am She's there to introduce Unit 05 and Kushiel SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 10, 2010 11:26 am Kushiel? Anyway, I like her so far. She's meant to be a mysterious figure so as long as she's not given the shaft in Q and Final, I'm not too worried.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Apr 10, 2010 11:44 am She's voiced by one of the greatest female voices of all time and she's fucking nuts in the best kind of way. If she turns out to be anything like my fanfiction thread and assaults people over ridiculous, broken unlogic, we'll have ourselves a winner.

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:17 pm ^ Yeeeeees. (The Yeeeees of Stephen Fry doing Melchet in Black Adder IV)

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:25 pm Kushiel?

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:37 pm Well, there's always your butthurt Asuka fanboy (someone had to say it), but honestly, looking at things the most objectively i can, i really think that her "Wheeee, giant robots are teh fun!" attitude actually managed to lessen dramatic tension whenever she appeared. I just couldn't take her or her involvment seriously. Singing before engagement? Exclaiming "Nyah!" before jumping Zeruel, the uberdestructive harbinger of Armageddon? Come on! Maybe she is a character who is meant to both enthrall and entertain, but call me weird: i don't want to be "entertained" in the classic fun having sense when i watch anything Eva related. I want to be pulverized into my chair and have my emotions violently be played with, something i just couldn't get out of her so far (for the record, 2.0 as a whole was pretty slim in this department for me). We know almost nothing of her yet, and can't even make guesses at how she will contribute to Rebuild as a whole in the future, but i honestly fear that she represents a paradigm shift towards "Fun with biomechs" from "Gritty inter-Apocalyptic tragedy". And Rebuild or not, happier Anno or not, in my mind, the latter is the only way for Eva to really work. Otherwise, it's just Gurren Lagann/Mazinger Z/<insert> with different giant robots.

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:49 pm We pretty much know nothing meaningful about Mari. The viewer's left to fanwank a personality for her; she's either the most corrupt or the most well-adjusted Eva pilot, depending on who you ask.

[]: Post by KaaVI » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:53 pm Lucretius wrote: We pretty much know nothing meaningful about Mari. The viewer's left to fanwank a personality for her; she's either the most corrupt or the most well-adjusted Eva pilot, depending on who you ask.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:53 pm Lucretius wrote: We pretty much know nothing meaningful about Mari.

[]: Post by KaaVI » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:57 pm Sachi wrote: THIS. I know that she's hot. I know that she's crazy. She sounds like my type of girl.

[]: Post by Electric Sachiel » Sat Apr 10, 2010 1:05 pm KaaVI wrote: she is also a beast!...in bed!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 10, 2010 1:23 pm TOPIC.

[]: Post by KaaVI » Sat Apr 10, 2010 1:23 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: I LOL'ed hard after reading that.... Yeah i can just imagine it now... One moment your making sweet love with her riding her away, and then she flips you on your back and does a crazy scream yelling out "HERE I COME!!!" and goes for your "rod", grabbing and twisting it fanatically. LOL. I'd say ouch if i was in that position...LOL.

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Apr 10, 2010 1:24 pm Anno gave so little information so that people will fanwank and speculate about her even when 2.0 ended. He likes to troll.
